summary.what: Fix uninstall leaving retired hooks, update help text
summary.why: Code review caught removeTimbersHooks only iterating current events — retired PostToolUse/PreToolUse hooks would persist after uninstall on v0.12/v0.13 upgrades
summary.how: Added retiredEvents loop to removeTimbersHooks, added test for retired event cleanup on uninstall, updated hooks install Long description from warns to blocks
